headline: Grayscale Sells $3B Bitcoin to Restore Investor Confidence

article.title: Grayscale's Pandl hopes Strategy sells $3B in Bitcoin to restore confidence

headline: Base Crypto Suffers 2 Outages Due to Sequencer Glitch

article.title: Base post-mortem reveals sequencer bug behind back-to-back outages
article.summary: A “race condition” after the system was reset prevented the sequencers from catching up, causing the second outage.

headline: Warsh Joins 2008 Fed Class Amid Market Turmoil

article.title: Warsh Makes Debut on the Global Stage With the Class of 2008
article.summary: Kevin Warsh and three other veterans of the 2008 global financial crisis will share a stage this week as the danger of renewed turmoil continues to haunt central bankers.

headline: BIS Warns AI Bust May Hit 20% Growth

article.title: AI Bust Risks Ripple Effects From Growth to Credit, BIS Says
article.summary: An artificial-intelligence bust, inflation and fiscal stress are among the most alarming threats to global prosperity at present, the Bank for International Settlements warned.
